commit.message:
Rename package from com.notification to org.notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Grafana dashboard by setting datasource UID and enabling histogram metrics

Dashboard panels referenced datasource uid "prometheus" but the
provisioned datasource had no explicit UID. Also enabled percentiles
histogram for HTTP server requests so p95/p99 latency panels have data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Redis cache serialization by using JSON instead of JDK serializer

The default JdkSerializationRedisSerializer requires cached objects to
implement Serializable. Entity classes (User, Device, NotificationTemplate)
don't, causing every @Cacheable call to fail with SerializationException
and resulting in 100% load test failures. Switch to
GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer. Also promote load-client error
logging from DEBUG to ERROR for better visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace wildcard imports with explicit single-class imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add healthcheck to notification-server for load-client readiness

The load-client was starting before the notification-server Spring Boot
app was ready, causing 100% request failures. Use actuator health
endpoint as healthcheck and require service_healthy condition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Docker build by generating per-service settings.gradle

Each Dockerfile was copying the shared settings.gradle which references
all subprojects, but only one subproject's source was available during
build. Generate a minimal settings.gradle with only the target subproject.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  PUT saves name, LLM config, privacy, notifications to Supabase
- Settings page: loads real user data (name, email, LLM config)
  on mount, saves changes via API, shows loading state on buttons

- Remove hardcoded "Jean Dupont" / "jean@example.com"

commit.message:
supervisor cycle #158: P6 @2500 val + ORCH_019 re-eval completed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: replace mapping DSL with SQL views, typed schemas, and end-to-end type safety (#420)

* docs(backend): generate field migration reference for all 15 tables

Auto-generated from existing mapping configs before any field names change.
Documents old API name -> new camelCase API name -> snake_case Python/SQL name
-> NocoDB source column for each table.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(backend): add alembic_views env and static Pydantic models

Phase 2: Create second Alembic environment at alembic_views/ targeting
SQL_CONN_STRING for managing materialized views. Initial migration
captures existing setup.sql content. Add migrate-views/revert-views
Makefile targets.

Phase 4: Replace dynamic create_model() generation in records.py with
15 explicit static Pydantic models using alias_generator=to_camel for
automatic snake_case->camelCase JSON serialization. Rewrite tests to
validate camelCase output and snake_case input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(backend): replace mapping DSL with direct view output in search/stats

Phase 5: Create filter_builder.py using pydantic.alias_generators.to_snake
for camelCase->snake_case filter field conversion. Replaces unsafe f-string
SQL construction with parameterized queries.

Phase 6: Remove all DataTransformerFactory.transform_result() calls from
search.py (5 call sites) and statistics.py (1 call site). Views now output
snake_case columns that match Pydantic model fields directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(backend): delete mapping DSL, transformers, and setup.sql

Remove ~4,500 lines of mapping config DSL that is replaced by
materialized views + static Pydantic models:
- 16 mapping config files in app/mapping/configs/
- app/mapping/enums.py
- app/schemas/mapping_schema.py
- 5 transformer service files
- app/sql/setup.sql (now in alembic_views migration)
- 16 related test/debug files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(backend): clean up alembic_views migration and Makefile targets

- Split initial_views migration into individual op.execute() calls
- Remove inline comments from SQL
- Fix Makefile migrate-views/revert-views to run from backend/ root

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(frontend): migrate field names from space-separated to camelCase

Update all entity types, composables, components, pages, and config
files to use camelCase field names matching the new backend API format.

- Rewrite 11 entity type interfaces and process functions
- Update ~50 consumer files (components, pages, composables, configs)
- Fix label/tooltip config objects to use camelCase keys
- Remove deleted mapping_schema import from schemas/__init__.py
- All 127 frontend tests pass, 0 TypeScript errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(backend): add SQL view column rename migration

Add migration 202603071100 that recreates all materialized views with
snake_case column aliases (e.g., "Case_Citation" AS case_citation).
Pydantic's alias_generator=to_camel then converts to camelCase JSON.

Also includes cleanup of the initial views migration formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* style(frontend): update slot names to match camelCase field keys

Prettier reformatted slot name strings in DetailDisplay.vue
to match the new camelCase-derived slot naming convention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(backend): improve materialized view performance and correctness

- Add cold_id indexes on all complete views for O(1) detail lookups
- Add search_all_count() function to avoid full search for pagination counts
- Fix non-deterministic LIMIT 1 in LATERAL joins with ORDER BY
- Fix broken downgrade in rename migration (SETUP_SQL no longer exists)
- Fix fragile UNIQUE index check in refresh function (use pg_index.indisunique)
- Combine double queries in search_for_entry into single SELECT
- Fix alias shadowing in answers_complete (jcodes -> cd_jcodes/di_jcodes/dlp_jcodes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(backend): version views as _v2 for safe prod deployment

Create _complete_v2 materialized views and _v2 SQL functions alongside
originals so prod can continue using old views during testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(frontend, backend): end-to-end type safety from Pydantic to TypeScript

Replace hand-written frontend entity interfaces with types generated from
the OpenAPI schema, establishing a typed pipeline from backend Pydantic
models through to the frontend API client.

Backend:
- Add alias_generator=to_camel to all Pydantic response models
- Add AnyRecord union type and validate_record() helper for entity-specific
  schema validation in search results
- Add missing fields to AnswerRecord, ArbitralAwardRecord, ArbitralRuleRecord

Frontend:
- Generate TypeScript types from OpenAPI schema (openapi-typescript)
- Replace all hand-written entity *Response interfaces with generated type
  aliases (components["schemas"]["XRecord"])
- Migrate all PascalCase field access to camelCase across pages, components,
  composables, config, and utils
- Add typed API client using openapi-fetch
- Add CI step to verify API types match production

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(frontend): document API type generation workflow

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: delete migration maps

* refactor(frontend, backend): replace complete views with base/relation views and detail endpoints

Replace the monolithic _v2 materialized views with lightweight base_* and
rel_* SQL views, get_entity_detail functions, and typed Pydantic detail
models. All entity pages now consume the /search/details endpoint for both
entity fields and relations in a single call. Flatten the migration chain
by removing the intermediate _v2 complete views that never reached prod.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(frontend, backend): use coldId route params and align schemas with detail endpoints

Rename all detail page routes from [id] to [coldId] to use human-readable
identifiers. Update backend schemas, views, and services to support the
new base/relation view architecture. Remove unused RelatedLiterature
component and useLiteratureByTheme composable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: add favicon for conductor

* fix(backend): harden record schemas, search validation, and migration downgrades

- Replace hardcoded NocoDB schema with config.NOCODB_POSTGRES_SCHEMA in
  get_specialists_by_jurisdiction
- Add VALID_DETAIL_TABLES allowlist to get_entity_detail, return 400 on
  unsupported table instead of DB exception
- Change RecordBase extra="allow" to extra="ignore" with
  coerce_numbers_to_str to prevent leaking internal DB columns
- Add model validator to coerce bool values to str for str-typed fields,
  handling camelCase alias resolution
- Fix validate_record to check both source_table and sourceTable keys
- Fix filter_builder to cast columns to text before ILIKE for type safety
- Complete migration downgrade to drop search functions before base views
- Fix Specialists cold_id from NULL to SP-{id} in get_entity_detail
- Downgrade logger.warning to logger.debug for normal search results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(frontend): remove inline comments, index signatures, and minor cleanups

- Remove [key: string]: unknown index signatures from ProcessedJurisdiction
  and JurisdictionOption
- Remove unused QuestionItem and AnswerItem interfaces from api.ts
- Update AGENTS.md table references from [id] to [coldId]
- Disable vue-query retries in dev mode for faster error feedback
- Fix search filter watcher to trigger on empty filters
- Remove redundant inline comments from detail pages and components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(frontend): address PR review comments

- Fix route.params.id → route.params.coldId in DetailDisplay jurisdiction watcher
- Normalize Specialists → specialists in getDisplayValue for camelCase consistency
- Remove String() coercion on filter values to preserve numeric/boolean types
- Add satisfies constraints to tooltip configs for compile-time key validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(backend): share bool coercion between records and details schemas

Extract coerce_bools_to_str validator from records.py as reusable function
and apply it to _DetailBase. Simplify detail field types by leveraging
coerce_numbers_to_str. Fix ruff I001 import sort in alembic_views/env.py.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs(frontend, backend): update README and CLAUDE to reflect current architecture

Update file structures, add SQL views documentation, document end-to-end
type safety pipeline, entity types, config directory, and data fetching
patterns. Remove references to deleted mapping configs and outdated Nuxt 3
references.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: format

* fix(frontend): use relations array for legal provisions instead of comma-split

Cold IDs like "DI-SGP-141 Sch I, Art. 28" contain commas, breaking the
join/split roundtrip. Iterate directly over the relations array instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix SmartOffice policy status mapping for import

Updated status mapping to match database enum values:
- SUBMITTED → PENDING (application submitted, pending review)
- APPROVED → ISSUED (approved but not yet in force)
- WITHDRAWN → DECLINED (application withdrawn/stopped)
- CANCELLED/CLOSED → LAPSED (policy terminated/closed)

This fixes import errors when uploading SmartOffice Excel reports.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove MiniMax model and add empty response guards

MiniMax M2.1 returns empty responses on multi-turn Bedrock Converse API
calls, causing JSON parse failures. Removed from catalog (11 models now).
Added empty response guards on all turns for resilience.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(safari): reemplazar requestIdleCallback?. por typeof guard en Sidebar

requestIdleCallback no existe en Safari/WebKit iOS. El optional chaining
sobre un identificador no declarado (requestIdleCallback?.()) lanza
ReferenceError en WebKit antes de que ?. pueda evaluarse, mientras que
en Chrome/Firefox no falla porque la API sí existe.

El ErrorBoundary capturaba el ReferenceError y mostraba "Algo salió mal"
en TODOS los iPhones (100% reproducible con motor WebKit).

Fix: typeof requestIdleCallback === "function" nunca lanza ReferenceError.

commit.message:
Type tag fields in TagStyleSpec, TagStyleRule, NodeSpec, and buffer/overlay types (#18)

- `TagStyleRule.tag: Any` → `tags: List<Tag>` with factory `TagStyleRule(tag: Tag, class: String)`
- `TagStyleSpec.tag: Any` → `tags: List<Tag>` with factory `TagStyleSpec(tag: Tag, style: SpanStyle)`
- `styleTags(Map<String, Any>)` → `styleTags(Map<String, Tag>)` for single-tag case
- Add `styleTagsList(Map<String, List<Tag>>)` for multi-tag entries (avoids JVM erasure clash)
- `TreeBuildSpec.buffer: Any` → sealed interface `TreeBuildBuffer` (`ListBuffer`, `CursorBuffer`)
- `NestedParse.overlay: Any?` → sealed interface `ParseOverlay` (`Ranges`, `Predicate`)
- `ParseOverlayMatch` sealed interface with `FullNode` and `CustomRange(range: TextRange)`
- Update all call sites: lezer-common, lezer-lr, lezer-highlight, language, lang-markdown,
  lang-html, lang-xml, lang-yaml, lang-jinja, lang-liquid
- Update API dumps and docs-site mixed-language example

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(coaching): revert to struct with per-call session for thread safety

Reverts AICoachingMessageService from final class back to struct.
Storing LanguageModelSession as mutable state with @unchecked Sendable
introduced a data race risk and force-unwrap crash potential.
Per-call session creation is safe and lightweight.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add sidecar JSONL for check results, relax parser regex, slider grading UI, scores cell sentinel

- runtime.py: _write_sidecar() writes check results to JSONL when
  MOGRADER_SIDECAR_PATH is set; called from check() and Grader.check()
- runner.py: creates sidecar temp file, passes via env, reads back
  CheckResults; falls back to HTML parsing when sidecar is empty
- parser.py: relaxed CALLOUT_PATTERN to accept any letter-prefixed label
  (not just Q\d+); updated dedup key to (label, status)
- models.py: CheckResult.details changed from str to list[str]
- formgrader_app.py: replaced mo.ui.text with mo.ui.slider for manual
  mark input with range enforcement from gradebook max_mark
- runtime.py: added MOGRADER_SCORES_CELL sentinel comment to scores()
- cells.py: added SCORES_MARKER constant
- feedback.py: uses sentinel instead of exact string match for scores
  cell removal

commit.message:
Feat: extract model usage, PR URLs, and error count from transcripts (#120)

* feat: extract model usage, PR URLs, and error count from transcripts

Add runtime extraction of three new metrics during stream processing:
- Model usage (which model generated each response)
- PR URLs (GitHub pull request URLs from tool results)
- Error count (tool results marked as errors)

These are surfaced in StatusInfo, ResultDetailInfo, and PersistedResult,
following the existing pattern for toolCalls and subagentCalls.

Also introduces pkg/transcript with TranscriptSummary and Summarize()
for consumers (klausctl, klaus-operator) to analyze transcripts without
the Python script. Includes message type distribution, plugin compliance
checks, and error text extraction.

Closes #119

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add caps: maxModelNameLen (256), maxPRURLsPerBlock (20), maxErrorTexts (100)
- Backfill ModelUsage and ErrorCount in Status() disk fallback path
- Require SubagentCall.Status == "completed" for plugin compliance
- Remove unused requiredPlugins var and dead len(counts)==0 branch
- Fix misleading boolean assertion in transcript_test.go

commit.message:
Fix NTP overfit test: cache sample to prevent random split each iteration

NTPDataset.__getitem__ picks a random doc/segment split point on every
call, so the single-sample overfit test was effectively training on ~300
different samples — causing loss oscillation and eventual NaN gradients.
Cache the sample once with a fixed seed so every iteration sees the
identical (doc, segment) pair.

feat: 공급단계별 상세 테이블 접기/펼치기 (그룹 헤더)

- 공급단계(원광, 중간재, 정제품, 기타)별 그룹 헤더 행 추가
- 헤더 클릭 시 해당 단계 품목 접기/펼치기 토글
- 그룹 헤더에 품목 수, 소계 금액, 비중 표시
- 단계별 색상 좌측 보더 + 배경색 구분

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
